description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly dark purple and black color scheme, accented by subtle metallic highlights. The body is streamlined with a prominent thumbhole stock, providing ergonomic grip and control. The barrel is elongated and appears to be a single-barrel configuration, with a vented or ribbed upper section for heat dissipation. The trigger guard is large and rounded, integrated smoothly into the lower receiver, and includes a visible finger groove for added comfort. The fore-end is compact and likely made of polymer, while the overall construction suggests a blend of metal and high-strength synthetic materials. The shotgun's design is tactical and futuristic, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability and durability are essential.
description: A sleek, modern shotgun with a dark purple and black finish, featuring a thumbhole stock and a single, vented barrel. Its ergonomic and tactical design is accented by a large, rounded trigger guard and streamlined body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, elongated barrel and the compact muzzle profile.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thumbhole stock, large trigger guard, and the full length of the vented barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's shape and the alignment of the barrel with the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the ergonomic grip, thumbhole stock, and the detailed structure of the fore-end and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible venting along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with an integrated finger groove
